title: POST /api/v1/statuses with Idempotency-Key
description: Implement post creation. Accepts status text, visibility, sensitive, spoiler_text, in_reply_to_id, language, media_ids. Handles Idempotency-Key header: hash with SHA-256 + account_id, check idempotency_keys table, return existing post if found. Store new post in posts table with snowflake ID. Prune idempotency_keys older than 24h in a background task.
design: Idempotency-Key header: hash SHA-256 of value + account_id (as hex). Check before insert. Return 200 with existing status if found. Post created with new snowflake ID. ap_id = https://{domain}/users/{username}/statuses/{id}. Status URL = https://{domain}/@{username}/{id}.
acceptance_criteria: Post from Ivory appears in the DB with correct fields; Idempotency-Key prevents duplicate on retry (same key returns same post); visibility options (public/unlisted/private/direct) are stored correctly; in_reply_to_id links to existing post; spoiler_text stored; missing required fields return 422
